summary: The diff implements the majority of the 19 requirements. Frontend components for transcription, clip editing tools, social features, notifications, meme overlays, sharing, and gallery are present. However, the backend REQ-19 implementation is not evidenced in the truncated diff (new Notification/MintedCollectible types and backend methods are absent from visible code, with frontend hooks using local/client-side state instead). REQ-14's TikTokify dual-view layout and Neon Captions toggle details are incomplete. Most other requirements appear implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the backend Motoko actor to add Notification type, MintedCollectible type, social feed entries, and methods: getMyNotifications, markNotificationRead, getMintedCollectibles, mintClip, getSocialFeed
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo is truncated and shows no evidence of Notification or MintedCollectible types or the required backend methods. The frontend useMintClip hook uses addMintedCollectible from a local useMintedCollectibles hook (client-side state), not a backend canister call. The migration.mo also does not include these new types. No backend getSocialFeed or getMyNotifications methods are visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: TikTokify preset button activating a Dual-View Layout preview with webcam placeholder (top) and gameplay video (bottom) in 9:16, plus a Neon Captions toggle with bold yellow-green (#CCFF00) text synced to playback position
missing_requirements.reason: TikTokifyPresetButton component exists as a toggle button only. No evidence of the actual dual-view layout rendering (webcam placeholder + gameplay split), nor the Neon Captions toggle component or its #CCFF00 styled caption rendering. The button component has no layout or preview logic.

hallucinated_features.description: GreenScreenOverlayButtons provides four color overlay options (Green, Red, Blue, Gold) rather than only green-screen overlay thumbnails
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies placeholder green-screen overlay thumbnail buttons. The implementation adds four arbitrary color tint buttons beyond what was specified, though this is a minor interpretation difference.
